name: Kalbsschnitzel Mit Feinen Gemusen (Veal Rounds / Vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the veal slices with salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat.
3. Sauté the veal slices until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
4. Place one stewed tomato, three asparagus spears, and a heaping tablespoon of mushrooms on each fillet.
5. Cook gently, pouring cooking juices over the fillets while cooking.
6. Continue cooking uncovered until the mushrooms are tender.
7. Serve with mashed potatoes and a salad.
